content.en:
"It turned out to be a disciple of the Imperial Beast Sect!"

Ye Tian was quite surprised.

Although he didn't know much about the Imperial Beast Sect, he also knew about the existence of the Imperial Beast Sect from the many classics of the battlefield ruins.

This is a Middle Triple Heaven Force, to be exact, a Fifth Heaven Force, which belongs to the middle level among the Middle Triple Heaven Forces, and such a force is already quite good.

In addition, the Imperial Beast Sect also controls a large number of Dao Ancestor-level Imperial Beasts, coupled with their Imperial Beast Ability, they can control an endless army of Chaos Fierce Beasts, and even the weaker Five Heavens forces are unwilling to offend them.

But the question is, how did the disciples of the Royal Beast Sect become abyss monsters?

It's not a disguise, it's a real abyssal monster!

"If I'm not mistaken, there is more than one disciple of the Royal Beast Sect who has become an abyss monster, and even ......"

Ye Tian couldn't imagine it, once his last guess was confirmed, it would mean that the entire Imperial Beast Sect had undergone tremendous changes, and perhaps the disciples and high-level members of the Imperial Beast Sect had all become abyss monsters.

What is the use of turning into an abyss monster? It is an obvious benefit, such as being difficult to kill, the strength skyrockets instantly, and the cultivation of becoming a true ancestor is greater and the potential is higher.

Just like the disciple of the Imperial Beast Sect just now, after becoming an abyss monster, his cultivation did not reach the level of the True Ancestor, but his strength crushed the top half-step True Ancestor, such a strength is placed among the cultivators, it is definitely the most demonic Tianjiao figure, but as long as the disciple of the Imperial Beast Sect becomes an abyss monster, almost everyone has such strength!

It is conceivable that once the Imperial Beast Sect has mastered the secret technique of turning into an abyss monster, it is not impossible for all of them to transform into abyss monsters.

"The news must be passed on to the other half-step true ancestors of the Void Heaven Palace, at least let them be a little mentally prepared, although the strength of these abyss monsters of the Royal Beast Sect is strong, but in fact, there is no way to use weapons and other secret techniques, as long as the number of half-step true ancestors is enough, plus there are hole cards, there is still hope to compete with it. Ye Tian estimated.

However, at the very least, it takes a top-notch half-step true ancestor and dozens of powerful half-step true ancestors to join forces to have any hope of confronting one, and they must be united, otherwise if they make a single move, they will definitely be killed in a short time.

Subsequently, Ye Tian passed the news to the other half-step true ancestors of the Void Heaven Palace, and the half-step true ancestors of the Void Heaven Hall also made friends with people from other forces, and also spread the news.

In this way, not long after, the half-step True Ancestors in the Infinite Abyss Fragment Ruins basically knew about the Imperial Beast Sect.

Ye Tian continued to sort out the treasures of the disciples of the Royal Beast Sect, and soon made new discoveries.

"A Treasure of the Way!"

Ye Tian was overjoyed.

I saw that he was holding a red long stick in his hand, a very small one, only about half a meter long, but it exuded a special energy, with the identification method that Ye Tian mastered, it could naturally be identified, this was a kind of Hedao treasure that could assist in Merge.

"It's a bit like Chigang refining heavenly crystals!"

Ye Tian guessed.

After various identification methods, he finally determined that this thing was really a Chigang Refining Heavenly Crystal, but the shape was a little strange.

The Chigang Refining Heavenly Crystal is a real Merge Dao treasure, and it is a Merge Dao treasure with no side effects, which can increase the supreme treasure of smelting essence and spirit by three percent.

Thirty percent of the odds, that's already a high odds.

Under normal circumstances, if a top True Ancestor wants to impact the Dao Ancestor realm, without using the treasure of the Ancestral Monument, just relying on his own Dao Convergence will only have a 1 in 10000 probability at most, or even 1 in 10,000 or 1 in 100,000!

Even if it was the Upper Triple Heaven Force, it could only make one percent of the top True Ancestors promote to Dao Ancestors.

And what kind of concept is this to increase the chance of 30 percent? If you can get a few more of these Harmony Treasures, then the probability of Harmony success is very great.

This kind of merging Dao almost relies on oneself to merge the Dao, and the potential is very high, and there is the hope of impacting the Fourfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor or even the Fifth Heavenly Dao Ancestor, which is not much stronger than those Dao Ancestors who rely on the ancestral monument to merge the Dao.

Therefore, the value of this Chigang Refining Heavenly Crystal is even comparable to a place in the Ancestral Monument.

For true geniuses, the number of ancestral monuments is not worth mentioning, and Chi Gang refining the Heavenly Crystal is useful to them.

"I've made a lot of money this time!"

Ye Tian smiled happily.

He had now determined that those disciples of the Imperial Beast Sect had really collected the Merge Dao treasures in advance, and maybe everyone had one or two Merge Dao treasures.

"In this case, as long as you kill the disciples of the Royal Beast Sect, you can continuously obtain the treasures of the Convergence Dao?"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

This plan works, but it's a bit risky!

He wasn't sure if the Imperial Beast Sect had an Abyss Lord, the strength of the Abyss Lord was too strong, and if multiple Abyss Lords appeared together, he might not be able to escape.

"It shouldn't be very likely, under the suppression of the rules of the Quasi-Dao Realm, even the Infinite Abyss Fragment will be affected, even if the Imperial Beast Sect has an Abyss Lord, it may not be able to awaken now!"

But Ye Tian knew very well that the Imperial Beast Sect could still forcibly awaken the disciples of the Abyss Lord level, after all, the True Ancestor had appeared on the battlefield ruins at the beginning.

However, the price of that was too great, and the True Ancestor was forcibly born, and there was no way to live for long.

And in the Infinite Abyss Fragments, even if the Abyss Lord of the Imperial Beast Sect was forcibly born and could survive, the price would inevitably be unbearable.

In short, it is unlikely that Ye Tian will encounter danger.

"Then look for the disciples of the Royal Beast Sect and strive to kill more disciples of the Royal Beast Sect!"

Ye Tian muttered.

......

A disciple of the Imperial Beast Sect died, and the other disciples of the Imperial Beast Sect soon found out.

"Li Cang is actually dead!"

Morn said angrily.

Li Cang's strength is not weak among the disciples of the Imperial Beast Sect, otherwise he would not have been selected to transform into an abyss monster, after all, the transformation of the Imperial Beast Sect into an abyss monster also requires a great price, and only a few disciples have obtained this treatment.

It stands to reason that with Li Cang's strength, few of the half-step True Ancestors can compete with him.

Moreover, the abyss monster has a strong recovery ability and strong defense, even if it can't beat others, there is still a great hope of escaping.

But now, Li Cang is dead!

The point is that Li Cang is dead, and with those treasures, classics, and materials on Li Cang's body, his identity is likely to be exposed.

In other words, the Imperial Beast Sect is exposed!

"Now that it's exposed, it's no longer hidden, I'm going to kill all the half-step True Ancestors!"

Morn's indifferent voice echoed through the hall.
